rows.english_源文: We fought **attached spirits** of different classes parasitizing our bodies — including a **Class-C1**-level entity (archive designation associated with the “**Hui’an**” tier), the **Class-C2** spirit **Qing Xiaoxian**, and the **Class-C3** spirit **Qian Kai**. They drove **severe illness across our family**.
rows.中文: 我们与附身于我们体内、等级各异的 **附体之灵** 抗争——包括 **C1** 级的 **鬼魂**「**惠安**」层级相关实体、**C2** 级灵体 **青小仙**，以及 **C3** 级灵体 **钱凯**。它们在我们全家引发了 **严重疾病**。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / Phase A 概要
创始人故事 / Phase A 概要
rows.english_源文: Our only motive was **self-rescue**: we tried every means we could to harm or destroy them. In doing so we learned the **physiological and physical properties of ghost bodies**, and communicated through **epileptic discharge**, **auditory hallucination sounds**, **consciousness dialogue**, **consciousness control**, and related modes — building a large, verified picture of the spirit world.
rows.中文: 我们唯一的动机是 **自救**：竭尽所能伤害或消灭它们。在此过程中，我们了解了 **鬼魂** 躯体的生理与物理特性，并通过 **癫痫放电**、**幻听声响**、**意识** 对话、**意识** 操控及相关模式与之沟通——构筑起一幅经过验证的、宏大的 **灵虚世界** 图景。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / Phase A 概要
创始人故事 / Phase A 概要
rows.english_源文: Our greatest regret in **Phase A** is that we did **not** systematically engage attached spirits on **other human hosts** outside our family, or in **other countries**.
rows.中文: 在 **A 阶段** 我们最大的遗憾，是没有系统性地在家人之外的 **其他国家**、**其他人类宿主** 身上接触附体之灵。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / Phase A 概要

rows.中文: 这一时期我们拍摄了 **吴氏灵体档案**（Woos Record of Soul）。

rows.english_源文: During this period, the **low-level soul** in my body used **high-voltage electrostatic discharge** into drinks and wine to change their taste, aiming to fabricate a chain of “scientific” phenomena and laws that would ultimately “prove” **Buddhism**.
rows.中文: 这一时期，我体内的 **低级鬼魂** 利用 **高压静电放电** 作用于饮料与酒，以改变其味道，旨在伪造一串「科学」现象与法则，最终「证明」**佛教**。

rows.english_源文: During this interval, the low-level soul used **epilepsy-like seizures** to impersonate, in sequence, the **three greatest gods of Buddhism**, pretending to convey **divine will** — until my sons and I had converted.
rows.中文: 这一时期，**低级鬼魂** 以 **类癫痫发作** 依次假冒 **佛教** 中 **三位最伟大的神（deity）**，佯称传达 **神意**——直至我与儿子们皈依。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: It was a **grotesque joke**; we were **playthings**. Even so, we exchanged a great deal of **philosophical insight** during the deception.
rows.中文: 那是 **荒诞的玩笑**；我们是 **玩物**。即便如此，在这场欺骗中我们仍交换了大量 **哲学洞见**。

创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: On **15 November 2020**, the **true identities** of the souls inside us and their **tricks** were finally exposed. In fear and rage we tried to **exorcise** them.
rows.中文: **2020年11月15日**，我们体内 **鬼魂** 的 **真实身份** 与 **把戏** 终于被揭开。在恐惧与愤怒中，我们试图 **驱灵**。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: Traditional methods failed repeatedly; we remembered they had always **forbidden** us to touch **strong magnets**. We began using magnets to **hurt** them.
rows.中文: 传统方法屡次失败；我们想起它们一贯 **禁止** 我们触碰 **强磁铁**。于是我们开始用磁铁 **伤害** 它们。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: Within days the soul in my **elder son** could not endure it and **left first**; about **six weeks** later the soul in my **younger son** left for the same reason.
rows.中文: 数日内，**长子** 体内的 **鬼魂** 不堪忍受而 **率先离开**；约 **六周** 后，**次子** 体内的 **鬼魂** 亦因同样原因离去。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: The soul in **me** refused to depart even when injured. I found that a **strong electrostatic field** could severely weaken its discharging: my **epilepsy vanished** the moment that happened — yet the soul **remained inside**, playing hide-and-seek.
rows.中文: **我** 体内的 **鬼魂** 即便受伤仍拒绝离开。我发现 **强静电场** 能大幅削弱其放电：**癫痫** 在那一刻消失——但 **鬼魂** 仍 **留驻体内**，仿佛在捉迷藏。

创始人故事 / A 阶段

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: In this stage we **found and confirmed** several ways to interfere with, injure, and **kill ordinary souls**.
rows.中文: 这一阶段，我们 **发现并证实** 了多种干扰、伤害乃至 **消灭普通鬼魂** 的方式。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: The limits of **electrostatic and magnet** work drew the attention of a **high-level soul** who had died in China roughly **1,500 years ago**. It joined the exploration: **consciousness transmission** for hints, while **steering the ordinary soul’s behavior** until I learned how to kill and expel **precisely and efficiently**.
rows.中文: **静电与磁铁** 手段的局限引起了一名约 **1500** 年前死于中国的 **高级控制灵** 的注意。它加入探索：以 **意识** 传讯提示，同时 **操控 C1 鬼魂** 的行为，直到我学会如何 **精确而高效** 地杀灭与驱逐。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: Each day I **tangled, fought, and coexisted** with the ordinary soul — **enemy and ally** at once — and traded large amounts of **spirit-relevant knowledge**.
rows.中文: 我每天与那只 **鬼魂** **周旋、搏杀又共存**——既是 **敌人** 也是 **盟友**——并交换大量与 **灵魂** 相关的知识。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: Finally the high-level soul **disclosed itself**, demonstrated **extraordinary abilities**, cleared up a year of confusion, taught me more of the **soul world** — then **left my body** and vanished quickly.
rows.中文: 最终，这名 **高级控制灵** **显露真身**，展现 **非凡能力**，厘清了一年来的困惑，向我讲授更多 **灵虚世界** 的知识——随后 **离开我的身体** 并迅速消失。

创始人故事 / A 阶段

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: In **December 2023** I was again possessed by the **Class-C2** spirit **Qing Xiaoxian**. Across roughly **1,700 years** as a ghost it had devoured on the order of **5,000–10,000** other souls, becoming an **enormous entity**.
rows.中文: **2023年12月**，我再次被 **C2** 级灵体 **青小仙** 附身。在约 **1700** 年的 **鬼魂** 岁月里，它吞噬了约 **5000—10000** 个其他 **灵魂**，成为 **庞大实体**。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: It turned the Woo home into a **haunted-house field**, spun **multiple avatars** onto both sons, and allowed its **core form** to coordinate those fragments **remotely**.
rows.中文: 它将吴宅变成 **房屋鬼魂**（house spirit）盘踞的场域，在两个儿子身上铺开 **多重化身**，并让其 **核心形态** **远程** 协调这些碎片。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: In the father: **schizophrenia**, **bipolar disorder**, **epilepsy**, **somatization**, and **powerful electrical assaults** on the heart. In the sons: **fatigue (energy coupling)**, **depression**, **pain disorder**, **IBS**, and further somatic patterns.
rows.中文: 父亲一侧：**精神分裂症**、**双相障碍**、**癫痫**、**躯体化**，以及对心脏的 **强电击**。儿子一侧：**疲劳（能量耦合）**、**抑郁**、**疼痛障碍**、**肠易激综合征** 及其他躯体表现。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: Father and sons continued to refine **exorcism** and **ghost-neutralization** until this entity was **fully destroyed**.
rows.中文: **吴氏父子** 持续精进 **驱灵** 与 **祛鬼**，直至该实体被 **彻底消灭**。

rows.section_板块: 创始人故事 / A 阶段
rows.english_源文: From **September 2024** through **January 2025** I was possessed again by the **Class-C3** spirit **Qian Kai**. **Higher ghost density means greater power** — so Qian Kai **exceeded** Qing Xiaoxian in **thought-control** and **pathogenic force**. We continued **self-rescue** until this spirit, too, was **eliminated**.
rows.中文: **2024年9月** 至 **2025年1月**，我再次被 **C3** 级灵体 **钱凯** 附身。**鬼魂** 密度越高，力量越大——因此钱凯在 **思想控制** 与 **致病力** 上 **超过** 青小仙。我们继续 **自救**，直到该灵体亦被 **清除**。

rows.中文: 纪录片档案 · 第一季

rows.english_源文: This Documentary Was Shot Earlier, Recording The Process Of Woos Father And Son Being Possessed By Spirits And Fighting. And The Scientific Summary Of Human Research On Supernatural Phenomena, Near-Death Experience And Reincarnation.
rows.中文: 这部纪录片拍摄时间较早，记录了吴氏父子被灵体附身及对抗的过程，同时也对人类关于超自然现象、濒死体验与轮回转世的研究进行了科学总结

rows.english_源文: When Woos record of Soul were filmed, Spirits were sometimes called ghost and sometimes soul, but in the spirit medicine filmed in 2025, ghosts were clearly called spirit(ghost).
rows.中文: 在拍摄吴氏灵体档案时，灵体有时被称作鬼魂，有时被称作灵魂；而在2025 年拍摄的灵医学影片中，鬼魂被明确称为灵体（鬼魂）

rows.english_源文: Introduction to Woos Record of Soul
An overview of the entire documentary , its methodology, and its revolutionary premise.
rows.中文: 对整部纪录片的全貌、方法论及其革命性前提作概览。

rows.english_源文: Scientifically prove the Existence of Souls through Epilepsy
rows.中文: 以癫痫科学证明灵魂存在

rows.english_源文: Demonstrating how electromagnetic, thermal, and quantum sensors can detect and record phenomena attributable to spirit presence.
rows.中文: 展示电磁、热学与量子传感器如何检测并记录可归因于灵体在场的现象。

rows.english_源文: PSI phenomena — telepathy, psychokinesis, clairvoyance — are the foundational gateway to understanding spiritual forces. Yet their legitimacy has long been dismissed as pseudoscience. This episode reveals groundbreaking research from China’s 507 Institute (China’s equivalent to NASA) — proving that spirit-derived forces are real, measurable, and reproducible.
rows.中文: 超感官知觉（PSI）现象——传心术、念力、遥视——是理解灵性力量的基础入口；其合法性却长期被斥为伪科学。本集揭示中国 507 研究所（相当于 NASA）的突破性研究，证明源自灵体的力量真实、可测量且可重复。

rows.english_源文: Unprecedented high-speed camera footage and irrefutable PSI experimental data never before shown to the public. The authenticity of these experiments — rigorously controlled, peer-reviewed, and non-fakeable — forms the core of this video.
rows.中文: 前所未有的高速摄影画面与无可辩驳的 PSI 实验数据，此前从未向公众公开。这些实验的真实性——严格受控、经同行评议、无法伪造——构成本片核心。

rows.english_源文: Origin, Destination after death of Souls & Impact on human
rows.中文: 灵魂的来源、死后去向及其对人类的影响

rows.english_源文: Where do human souls come from? Where do they go after death? Do they ascend to heaven, descend to hell, or reincarnate according to religious doctrines?This episode reveals a startling truth: The primary destination of ancestral human spirits is not another realm — but parasitic attachment to living human beings.
rows.中文: 人的灵魂从何而来？死后去往何处？它们升天、入地，还是依宗教教义轮回？本集揭示一个惊人事实：人类祖灵魂魄的主要归宿并非另一界域，而是寄生性地依附于在世之人。

rows.english_源文: Drawing on 12 peer-reviewed studies from Western universities and ICD-11 Category 6B6 (Spirit Attachment Disorders), this series maps the global distribution of spirit attachment and demonstrates its direct link to dissociative disorders, identity fragmentation, and unexplained psychological symptoms.
rows.中文: 援引西方大学 12 篇同行评议研究与 ICD-11 第 6B6 类（灵体依附障碍），本系列绘制灵体依附的全球分布，并展示其与解离障碍、身份碎裂及不明心理症状的直接关联。

rows.english_源文: Material Foundation of soul: Spiritual World has Natural Internet Attribute
rows.中文: 灵魂的物质基础：灵界具有天然的“互联网”属性

rows.english_源文: Traditional materialism denies spirit(Ghost) existence by asserting that consciousness is merely an epiphenomenon of the brain — and thus ceases at death. But Chinese PSI research proves otherwise: The ethereal realm possesses an innate, internet-like architecture capable of transmitting conscious information in GIF-like formats via a “blog-style” addressing system.This proves: Consciousness and the soul can exist independently of the physical brain.
rows.中文: 传统唯物主义以“意识仅大脑之附随现象、死后即灭”否定灵（鬼）的存在；但中国 PSI 研究证明并非如此：灵界具有内在的、类似互联网的架构，能藉“博客式”寻址系统以类 GIF 格式传递意识信息。这证明：意识与灵魂可以在肉体大脑之外独立存在。

rows.english_源文: Four groundbreaking PSI papers by Professor Shao Laisheng of Fudan University and colleagues demonstrate that humans can transmit pure conscious information — without instruments — from Shanghai to Beijing, directly through mental intent.
rows.中文: 复旦大学邵来圣教授等四篇突破性 PSI 论文证明：人类可以不经仪器，仅凭意念将纯粹意识信息从上海传至北京。

rows.english_源文: Scientific Proof of Soul Parasitism/Possession caused Mental / Psychosis Illnesses
rows.中文: 灵魂寄生/附体导致精神/精神病性疾病的科学证明

rows.english_源文: In this world, where is it easy to find a spirit(ghost)? In countless patients with dissociative disorder, schizophrenia, epilepsy, depression, somatization disorder and many other diseases. This series of videos will deeply discuss the etiology research and pain brought by spirit(ghost) to mental patients.
rows.中文: 这世上，哪里最容易找到灵（鬼）？在无数解离障碍、精神分裂症、癫痫、抑郁症、躯体化障碍等疾病的患者身上。本系列视频将深入讨论灵（鬼）对精神疾病患者的病因学研究与痛苦。

rows.english_源文: This series of videos shows the distribution of spiritual body in the world with 15 medical research papers from famous western universities and precious real video materials of spirit(ghost) possession. The statistics of psychiatry are often the distribution data of spirit(ghost).
rows.中文: 本系列以 15 篇西方著名大学的医学研究论文与珍贵的灵（鬼）附体真实影像资料，展示灵体在世界上的分布。精神病学的统计往往就是灵（鬼）的分布数据。

rows.english_源文: Deep Exploration of Soul-triggering Epilepsy’s Mechanism
rows.中文: 灵体诱发癫痫机制的深入探讨

rows.english_源文: The Woos own epilepsy is caused by spirit(ghost) possession — directly contradicting modern neurology’s claim that epilepsy arises solely from abnormal neural firing. This series reveals: spirit(ghost) are material entities capable of emitting electromagnetic charges. These charges induce epileptogenic foci in the human brain, triggering seizures.
rows.中文: 吴氏自身的癫痫由灵（鬼）附体引起——与现代神经病学所谓癫痫仅源于异常放电的说法直接相悖。本系列揭示：灵（鬼）是能够发出电磁电荷的物质实体；这些电荷在人脑中诱发致痫灶，引发癫痫发作。

rows.english_源文: Supported by 15 peer-reviewed medical papers from global universities and the Wu family’s personal medical records, this series provides irrefutable evidence that spirit-induced illness operates through physical, material mechanisms — not metaphysical mysticism.
rows.中文: 以全球大学 15 篇同行评议医学论文与吴氏家族个人病历为支撑，本系列提供无可辩驳的证据：灵体致病通过物质、物理机制运作，而非玄学神秘主义。

rows.english_源文: The truth of NDE – sophisticated illusions orchestrated by parasitic souls
rows.中文: 濒死体验（NDE）的真相：寄生灵魂导演的精巧幻觉

rows.english_源文: Near-death experiences (NDEs) — tunnels of light, deceased relatives, out-of-body journeys — are widely cited as proof of an afterlife. But this series proves: NDEs are not glimpses of death — they are hallucinations generated by attached spirits(ghosts). Through five analytical dimensions — consistency with other possession phenomena, visual structure, cross-cultural variation, and post-NDE psychic sequelae — this series dismantles the myth of NDEs as evidence of an afterlife.
rows.中文: 濒死体验（NDE）——光隧道、亡亲、离体旅程——常被引为死后世界的证据。但本系列证明：NDE 并非对死亡的瞥见，而是附体灵（鬼）生成的幻觉。通过五维分析——与其它附体现象的一致性、视觉结构、跨文化差异及 NDE 后异能后遗症——本系列拆解 NDE 作为死后证据的神话。

rows.english_源文: A deep analysis of 34 peer-reviewed NDE studies from top Western universities. Unlike popular media, which cherry-pick romanticized accounts, this series presents the full, unfiltered dataset — revealing NDEs as culturally conditioned, neurobiologically induced illusions orchestrated by spirit entities.
rows.中文: 深入分析 34 篇顶尖西方大学的同行评议 NDE 研究。与只挑选浪漫化叙事的通俗媒体不同，本系列呈现完整、未经筛选的数据集，揭示 NDE 为文化塑造、神经生物学诱导、由灵体实体编排的幻觉。

rows.english_源文: Past life memories come from parasitic souls, it can not prove reincarnation
rows.中文: 前世记忆来自寄生灵魂，无法证明轮回

rows.english_源文: Through the human mind’s “consciousness input port” — particularly the memory system — attached spirits(ghosts) transmit their own life experiences in first-person narrative form. The host misinterprets these as their own past-life memories, leading to the widespread belief in reincarnation. This series demonstrates that reincarnation is a cognitive illusion, not a metaphysical reality.
rows.中文: 藉由人类心智的“意识输入端口”——尤其是记忆系统——附体灵（鬼）以第一人称叙事形式传输其自身经历。宿主误将之当作自己的前世记忆，导致轮回信仰的广泛传播。本系列论证：轮回是认知错觉，而非形而上学事实。

rows.english_源文: Rigorous logical analysis: The alleged “reincarnated self” has no biological continuity. It lacks a coherent sense of “I” — no unified identity, no persistent consciousness. Memory transfer ≠ identity transfer. This series exposes a fundamental error in spiritual research: mistaking information transfer for soul migration.
rows.中文: 严谨逻辑分析：所谓“转世者”没有生物学连续性；缺乏统一的“我”的感知——没有统一身份、没有持续意识。记忆转移不等于身份转移。本系列揭示灵性研究中的根本性错误：将信息转移误认作灵魂迁移。

rows.english_源文: Whether Souls have Eyes? Scientific Discovery on Spiritual Vision
rows.中文: 灵魂是否有眼睛？灵性视觉的科学发现

rows.english_源文: Eyes are a fundamental condition shaping the very nature of spirits(ghost) existence. If spirits(ghost) lack eyes, this fundamentally challenges every cultural, religious, and metaphysical assumption about the afterlife. Across nearly all human cultures, the ethereal realm is depicted as containing hellfires, paradisiacal realms, demons, gods, and other spirits. But how can spirits(ghost) perceive these environments — or each other — without visual organs? How can the imagined existence of spirits(ghost) even be coherent without sight?
rows.中文: 眼睛是塑造灵（鬼）存在本质的基本条件。若灵（鬼）没有眼睛，则从根本上挑战所有文化、宗教与形而上学关于来世的假设。在几乎所有人类文化中，灵界都被描绘成地狱火、天堂、恶魔、神明及其他灵体。但灵（鬼）如何在没有视觉器官的情况下感知这些环境——或彼此？没有视觉，灵（鬼）想象的存续又如何自洽？

rows.english_源文: This series draws upon 19 peer-reviewed academic papers from China’s most prestigious institutions — including the Institute of Physics and Institute of Biophysics (Chinese Academy of Sciences), Peking University, National Taiwan University, Beijing Normal University, and the Shanghai Institute of Laser Technology — combined with the firsthand experiential accounts of the Wu family. Collectively, they provide conclusive evidence: spirits(ghost) do not possess eyes.
rows.中文: 本系列引用 19 篇来自中国顶尖机构的同行评议论文——包括中科院物理所、生物物理所、北京大学、台湾大学、北京师范大学与上海激光技术研究所——并结合吴氏家族第一手体验。共同提供结论性证据：灵（鬼）没有眼睛。

rows.english_源文: Discover the truth of body shape, organs, material composition and metabolism of souls
rows.中文: 揭示灵魂的形体、器官、物质组成与代谢的真相

rows.english_源文: The ethereal body is material in nature. This series represents the first systematic scientific exploration into the physical structure, organ systems, material composition, and energy metabolism of human spirits(soul) after death — marking humanity’s initial step toward understanding the material reality of the ethereal realm.
rows.中文: 灵体本质上是物质性的。本系列首次系统性地科学探索人类死后灵魂（魂）的物理结构、器官系统、物质组成与能量代谢——标志着人类理解灵界物质现实的第一步。

rows.english_源文: Drawing on 8 international academic studies, the ICD-11 classification (Category 6B6: Spirit Attachment Disorders) from the World Health Organization, and rare archival footage, this series presents the most comprehensive and empirically grounded analysis to date of the spirit body’s anatomical and physiological characteristics..
rows.中文: 综合 8 项国际学术研究、WHO ICD-11 分类（第 6B6 类：灵体依附障碍）与珍稀档案影像，本系列迄今对灵体解剖与生理特征最全面、最具实证依据的分析。

rows.english_源文:
This report synthesizes one documented year (**2025**) of **TikTok Live** sessions coordinated with **Master Spirits**: headline quantities, baseline observations on **American attached spirits (ghosts)**, routine mental-disorder–related presentations, structured session techniques, self-reported outcomes, exploratory procedures, and  highlighted special cases.

It foregrounds **transparent field documentation**; it is **not** framed as a randomized controlled trial.
rows.中文:
本文档为**灰文献式汇总**：**2025** 年度在 **TikTok 直播**内、与 **master spirit** 协同的田野记录——**核心量级**、**美国附体鬼魂（ghosts）**基线、**mental disorder** 相关呈现、技术路径、自述转归、探索步骤与**四则**突出个案。

侧重**过程透明**，**不**宣称等同**随机对照试验**。

Within **30 minutes**, **>80%** of human hosts and attached spirits (ghosts) reported **complete relief** of acute mental distress (spirits in this cohort also showed **mental-disorder–like states**).

Through **24 December 2025**, **most** did not request a **second round** of regulation — i.e. **no relapse** in that window **by self-report**.

改善后至 **2025 年 12 月 24 日**，**多数**未再要求**二次鬼魂控制**，即**自述**该时段内**无复发**。

rows.english_源文:
In just the past year, on **TikTok Live**, with **anonymous**, **randomly presenting** participants: more than **255+** public-benefit livestreams, with total airtime exceeding **800+ hours**.

Roughly **70,000+** related listeners were reached; more than **1,200+** extended interviews; **effective spirit (ghost) regulation** reached **240+** individuals with mental-disorder presentations; about **400+** attached spirits/ghosts were brought forward (**some hosts carried multiple spirits**).

仅仅过去一年、**TikTok 线上直播**、**匿名**、**随机**到访者：**超过 265 场**公益直播，总时长**超过 800 小时**。

约 **70000+** 触达；与 **1200+** 名听众**深度访谈**；**有效鬼魂控制**逾 **240 名**各类 **mental disorder** 患者；唤出约 **400 名附体鬼魂**（**部分多灵附体**）。

rows.english_源文: During approximately the past year of TikTok live broadcasts, participants arrived as anonymous, randomly presenting individuals without prior triage. Each encounter used a consistent initial window of thirty minutes for structured exchange, assessment, and spirit-realm–assisted regulation. Outcomes below combine session documentation with participant self-reports; they are presented to illustrate the breadth of the practice rather than as a substitute for peer-reviewed clinical trials.
rows.中文: 在过去约一年的 TikTok 直播中，参与者以匿名、随机到场的方式进入，无事先分诊。每次接触均使用统一的首个三十分钟窗口，进行结构化交流、评估与灵界辅助调节。下列结果合并了会话记录与参与者自述；旨在展示实践广度，而非替代同行评审临床试验。
